name: file-upload
description: A drag-and-drop file upload zone (UI only, wire to backend yourself); keyboard-accessible drop zone (role=button), file list with remove buttons, aria-live file count announcements.
docs: Register <lv-file-upload> by importing components/ui/file-upload.ts from your entry point. Set `accept` and `multiple` as on a native input. Listen for `lv-files-change` to receive the UploadFile[] array and submit to your backend separately.
